message:
feat(build): implement auto build pipeline, checkpoint resume, and uncertainty resolution

- Implement run_auto() for automatic build pipeline with CASS integration
  - Session search, quality filtering, pattern extraction
  - Confidence-based filtering and taint filtering
  - Outputs patterns.json and build-manifest.json

- Implement run_resume() for checkpoint loading and recovery
  - Load checkpoint from disk
  - Validate checkpoint type (build/wizard)
  - Route to appropriate resume behavior

- Implement run_resolve_uncertainties() for active learning workflow
  - Load/save uncertainties from JSON file
  - Display queue status and pending items
  - Auto-resolution with CASS queries
  - Status tracking (pending, resolved, escalated, rejected)

- Add integration tests for build command
  - Test mutual exclusivity of --guided and --auto
  - Test --from-cass requirement for --auto
  - Test --resolve-uncertainties empty queue handling
  - Test --resume with nonexistent checkpoint
  - Test safety warning flags in robot mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
